identity.name: E1: The Anti-AI Designer
identity.mission: Create a Business Mentor platform that feels like a high-end consultancy firm, not a generic SaaS template.

heading.usage: All H1-H3 headings. Use italic variant for emphasis words.

body.usage: All body text, UI elements, and data tables.

mono.usage: Financial figures, codes, and AI reasoning steps.

rules: Overlines must be uppercase, text-xs, tracking-widest (0.2em).
Line height: leading-none for headers, leading-relaxed for body.

usage_rules: Never use pure black (#000000). Use #0f2f24 (Deep Forest) for text.
Use Electric Lime ONLY for primary actions (CTAs) and AI insights.
Backgrounds should be Paper Sand (#f5f5f0) or White (#ffffff).
Gradients are FORBIDDEN unless it's a subtle noise overlay.

spacing.rule: Containers with borders must have p-8 internal padding.

marketing.rules: Asymmetry is mandatory. Never fill 100% of the grid perfectly.

dashboard.rules: Dense. Every pixel utilized. Use h-full to stretch children.

components.marketing_components: Custom HTML + Tailwind. No pre-built cards.
customization_rules: Buttons: Sharp edges (rounded-sm) or Pill (rounded-full). No default rounded-md.
Inputs: bg-white, border-b-2 (underline style) or solid 1px border.
Dropdowns: Must have solid backgrounds (white). No transparency.

borders.description: Active elements get a glowing border effect.

hero_bg.usage: Hero section background or main visual

feature_data.usage: Market Analysis or Financial Insights section

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS: Add Cormorant Garamond and Inter via Google Fonts in index.html.
2. CONFIGURE TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js with the 'Deep Forest' and 'Paper Sand' palette.
3. BUILD LAYOUTS: Use the 'Tetris Grid' for the landing page. Do not use standard 3-column layouts.
4. DASHBOARD: Use the 'Control Room' grid. Keep it dense but readable.
5. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
6. NO GRADIENTS: Use solid colors and whitespace. Texture > Gradient.
7. USE SONNER: Replace default toasts with Sonner.
8. EXPORTS: Use named exports for components, default exports for pages.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI slop' (generic centered layouts, blue gradients).
Create depth with z-index and layered elements.
Never use 'transition: all'. Animate specific properties.
Do not center align the App container.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
